title: Query Complexity: Quantum vs Classical Queries
description: Understand quantum query complexity, oracle problems, and the quantum speedups achievable through quantum parallelism and interference.
learningObjectives: Define query complexity in the quantum and classical settings
Understand the role of oracles in complexity theory
Analyze Grover's quadratic speedup in query complexity
Study exponential query separations like Simon's problem
Prove query lower bounds using polynomial method and adversary method
Connect query complexity to algorithm design
